title: Topological Phases Core Future Buffer
summary: Topic-level future buffer for branches that are known to matter but are still too wide to promote responsibly in the current pass.

items.notes: Umbrella future-buffer branch now split into narrower Wilson-loop, degeneracy, and fractional-statistics subgaps.
Umbrella background-source recovery task for the split future-buffer branch.
Wilson-loop algebra remains buffered as its own narrower branch.
Topological ground-state degeneracy remains buffered as its own narrower branch.
Fractional charge and anyonic statistics remain buffered as their own narrower branch.
Focused future-buffer task for the Wilson-loop and degeneracy subbranches.
Focused future-buffer task for the fractionalized quasiparticle subbranch.
Lecture Three now carries both the promoted edge-mode theorem family and the explicitly split buffered FQHE branch.
